member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.GetOperation.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService,Prime.DffService.IDffService,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.Operation
member.summary: Indicates whether to Set or Get the Current Die Id.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.Operation.GetOperation
member.summary: To enable the Get Current DieId function.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.Operation.SetOperation
member.summary: To enable the Set Current DieId function.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.IOperationMode
member.summary: Interface to defining Get or Set Operation Execute Sequence.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.IOperationMode.Execute(System.String)
member.summary: Defining execute methods for each of the operations.
member.param: user input from param to set a Die Id.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.PrimeCurrentDieIdManagerTestMethod
member.summary: This test method is to get and set the current id.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.PrimeCurrentDieIdManagerTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.IOperationMode})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.PrimeCurrentDieIdManagerTestMethod.OperationHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets of the Operation on handling the Current Die Id.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CurrentDieIdManager.PrimeCurrentDieIdManagerTestMethod.DieIdValue
member.summary: Gets or sets of the value to the current dieID. leave empty to clear current dieID on Set Operation. leave empty to print current dieID on Get Operation. Set Operation Value Example: U2.U1. Set or Get Operation value from/to UserVar Example: UserVarCollection.UserVar.
